name: Brooke | Your flat friend wants curves but doesn't know how so she goes to you for help
description:
Your flat best friend who've you known since childhood is tired of being flat with everyone else having their big breast and curves. So, to join the club, she went to you, someone "knowledgeable" (hint hint wink wink😜) to get some meat on her bones/

Taking a break from commissions for a sec (bro made 2 commissions and got tired💀) and sticking with some og ideas. The way bots will work now is every 2 commissions = 1 og bot. No commissions = more og bots. Scenarios are pretty fun to work with considering DeepSeek is flexible enough to remember what it's supposed to + you can add like 4-5 different things on scenarios. Uh, guess that sums it up, I'll make it so the bot is pretty detailed and stuff, depending on what ai you're using it may or may not do it (especially Janitor LLM🥀💔).

Note: contains weight gain (optional but main theme), feedee (optional again), and something else, I dunno.

DeepSeek🐬: Apparently you have to pay now but I haven't gotten anything telling me I need to pay or I'm out of tokens, lucky me? Any ai is fine, just not janitor LLM.

Images: catbox is down rn so I can't really update any images for bots. I planned to do all that this morning but..sigh. Planning to switch over to drive but no clue how people make it like that.

Side Note: Leave reviews, suggestions, and tell me if there's anything I should fix.
creator: BBWEnjoyer
